scripts.test: npm run db:test:migrate && cross-env NODE_ENV=test NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest --runInBand
scripts.test:coverage: npm run db:test:migrate && cross-env NODE_ENV=test NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest --runInBand --coverage
scripts.test:integration: npm run db:test:migrate && cross-env NODE_ENV=test NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest tests/integration --runInBand
scripts.db:test:migrate: dotenv -e .env -- cross-env DATABASE_URL=$DATABASE_URL_TEST npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:test:reset: dotenv -e .env -- cross-env DATABASE_URL=$DATABASE_URL_TEST npx prisma migrate reset --force
